title: macrocycle_v1 — MACROCYCLE sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/macrocycle_sim.py. One row per ligand (macrocycle or acyclic analog): the conformational microstate count W_conf, the Boltzmann conformational entropy S_conf = R*ln(W_conf), the binding conformational-entropy penalty, and the Lipinski rule-of-5 / beyond-rule-of-5 classification. Anchored to the macrocyclization pre-organization entropy effect and Boltzmann's S = R*ln(W). MACROCYCLE is a SUB-AXIS :> WEAVE (core, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @D sub_under_weave) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis; core-5 (AXIS/AXIS.tape) UNCHANGED. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

ligand.description: Ligand identifier within the deterministic panel.

is_macrocycle.description: True for the ring-closed macrocycle, false for its acyclic analog.

modality_note.description: Short description of the modelled ligand class.

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

temperature_K.description: Temperature used for the binding-entropy penalty (K).

ring_constraint_factor.description: f_ring in (0,1]: in-ring bonds have effective rotamer multiplicity f_ring * free multiplicity.

molecular_weight.description: Molecular weight (g/mol), illustrative literature-informed magnitude for the class.

n_rotatable_bonds.description: Total rotatable-bond count of the ligand.

n_bonds_in_ring.description: Number of rotatable bonds constrained inside the macrocyclic ring (0 for an acyclic analog).

n_bonds_free.description: Number of unconstrained (free) rotatable bonds = n_rotatable_bonds - n_bonds_in_ring.

rotamer_multiplicity_free.description: Discrete rotamer multiplicity of a free rotatable bond (~3 staggered rotamers).

rotamer_multiplicity_in_ring.description: Effective rotamer multiplicity of a ring-constrained bond = ring_constraint_factor * rotamer_multiplicity_free.

conformational_microstates_W.description: Conformational microstate count W_conf = product of per-bond rotamer multiplicities.

ln_W_conf.description: Natural log of W_conf (log-space computation for numerical stability).

S_conf_cal_per_mol_K.description: Boltzmann conformational entropy S_conf = R*ln(W_conf), in cal/(mol*K).

S_conf_J_per_mol_K.description: Boltzmann conformational entropy S_conf = R*ln(W_conf), in J/(mol*K); >= 0 always (Boltzmann real limit).

binding_entropy_penalty_kcal_per_mol.description: Conformational-entropy penalty -T*deltaS paid on freezing into the bound conformer (kcal/mol, >= 0).

ro5_violations.description: List of Lipinski rule-of-5 bounds exceeded (MW>500, HBD>5, HBA>10, cLogP>5).

beyond_rule_of_5.description: True iff >= 2 rule-of-5 bounds are exceeded (the bRo5 property space). Metadata flag, not a permeability prediction.
